detail: MIMIC-IV version 3.1; eICU Collaborative Research Database version 2.0
MIMIC-IV internal validation 2026071601; eICU hospital-cluster bootstrap 2026071602; sensitivity analyses 2026071603
MIMIC-IV internal validation 1000 repetitions; eICU hospital-cluster bootstrap 2000 repetitions; calibration-slope intervals used 1,000 outer and 200 inner repetitions
Time from prediction landmark to hospital exit was summarized descriptively; no model was refitted

Machine-readable copies of Tables S1-S19, full-precision transformations and primary-model coefficients, external calibration-intercept estimates, and aggregate hospital-influence summaries accompany this appendix
Only aggregate outputs are reported; patient-level rows and protected hospital identifiers are not included
